content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded jointly to Frances H. Arnold for the directed evolution of enzymes, and to George P. Smith and Sir Gregory P. Winter for the phage display of peptides and antibodies.
raw_content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded jointly to Frances H. Arnold for the directed evolution of enzymes, and to George P. Smith and Sir Gregory P. Winter for the phage display of peptides and antibodies.
